commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=daf749f56db90c446785f7f91e8156f9f66ce56d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves assist-specific repository_dispatch options under client_payload.assist, updates assist.yml to read that nested object, and adds regression coverage for visual assist payload shape.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, not from a live run: current main sends and reads flat assist fields, the related issue identifies repository_dispatch validation as the failure, and the PR changes that payload shape. The fallback regression is also source-reproducible because the new workflow expressions no longer reference the old flat fields.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker includes contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus a small compatibility fix, so this should stay in human PR review rather than starting a repair lane.

target.title: fix: nest assist dispatch options
target.body:
## Summary

- nest assist-specific repository_dispatch options under client_payload.assist
- update assist.yml to read the nested assist options
- add regression coverage for visualize dispatch payload size and mode/lens routing

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/202

## Validation

- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json
- node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check .github/workflows/assist.yml src/repair/comment-router-core.ts src/repair/comment-router.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- npm_config_cache=/private/tmp/clawsweeper-npm-cache npx pnpm@10.33.2 run check
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
